info.title: Long Video Summarization API
info.description: Accelerated long video summarization and insight extraction service.

get.description: Get LVS metrics in prometheus format.
Get LVS readiness status (v1 endpoint). Returns 503 when a required dependency (e.g. RTVI VLM) is unavailable.

503.description: Service not ready. A required dependency is unavailable.

get.description: Get VIA service health status with version information.

get.summary: Lists the currently available models, and provides basic information about each one such as the owner and availability
get.description: Lists the currently available models, and provides basic information about each one such as the owner and availability.

post.description: Run video file summarization. For stream summarization use POST /v1/generate_captions and POST /v1/stream_summarize instead.

400.description: Bad Request. The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

503.description: Server is busy processing another file. Client may try again in some time.

post.description: Run video file summarization. For stream summarization use POST /v1/generate_captions and POST /v1/stream_summarize instead.

400.description: Bad Request. The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

503.description: Server is busy processing another file. Client may try again in some time.

post.description: Fire-and-forget: kicks off VLM captioning on RTVI for a stream that was previously added via RTVI stream/add. Returns immediately once RTVI acknowledges the request.

400.description: Bad Request. The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

post.description: Aggregate existing captions for a stream from the database via CA-RAG and return a structured summary. The stream must have been previously started with /v1/generate_captions.

400.description: Bad Request. The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

503.description: Server is busy. Client may try again later.

400.description: Bad Request. The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name for the alert that was triggered.

ntpTimestamp.title: Ntptimestamp
ntpTimestamp.description: NTP timestamp of when the event occurred (for live-streams).

offset.title: Offset
offset.description: Offset in seconds in the video file when the event occurred (for files).

content.title: Content
content.description: The contents of the message. For VLM captions API, this field contains a combined response with timestamps for each chunk.
examples:
[00:00 - 01:00] A worker is walking down the aisle.

[01:00 - 02:00] A man is driving a forklift in the warehouse.

role.title: Role
role.description: The role of the author of this message.

ChatCompletionResponseMessage.title: ChatCompletionResponseMessage
ChatCompletionResponseMessage.description: A chat completion message generated by the model.

ChatCompletionToolType.title: ChatCompletionToolType
ChatCompletionToolType.description: Types of tools supported by VIA.

CompletionFinishReason.title: CompletionFinishReason
CompletionFinishReason.description: The reason the model stopped generating tokens.

choices.title: Choices
choices.description: A list of chat completion choices. Can be more than one if `n` is greater than 1.

created.title: Created
created.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the chat completion/summary request was created.

model.title: Model
model.description: The model used for the chat completion/summarization.

media_info.title: Media Info
media_info.description: Part of the file / live-stream for which this response is applicable.

object.description: The object type, which can be `chat.completion` or `summarization.completion` or `summarization.progressing`.

finish_reason.description:
The reason the model stopped generating tokens. This will be `stop` if the model hit a natural stop point or a provided stop sequence,
`length` if the maximum number of tokens specified in the request was reached,
`content_filter` if content was omitted due to a flag from our content filters.

index.title: Index
index.description: The index of the choice in the list of choices.

query_processing_time.title: Query Processing Time
query_processing_time.description: Summarization Query Processing Time in seconds.

summary_tokens.title: Summary Tokens
summary_tokens.description: Total Number of tokens used for summary.

aggregation_tokens.title: Aggregation Tokens
aggregation_tokens.description: Total Number of tokens used for aggregation.

summary_requests.title: Summary Requests
summary_requests.description: Total Number of requests for summary.

CompletionUsage.title: CompletionUsage
CompletionUsage.description:
An optional field that will only be present when you set
`stream_options: {"include_usage": true}` in your request.

When present, it contains a null value except for the last chunk which contains
the token usage statistics for the entire request.

ListModelsResponse.title: ListModelsResponse
ListModelsResponse.description: Lists and describes the various models available.

type.title: Type
type.description: Information about a segment of media with start and end offsets.

start_offset.title: Start Offset
start_offset.description: Segment start offset in seconds from the beginning of the media.

end_offset.title: End Offset
end_offset.description: Segment end offset in seconds from the beginning of the media.

MediaInfoOffset.title: MediaInfoOffset
MediaInfoOffset.description: Media information using offset for files.

type.title: Type
type.description: Information about a segment of live-stream with start and end timestamp.

start_timestamp.title: Start Timestamp
start_timestamp.description: Timestamp in the video to start processing from

end_timestamp.title: End Timestamp
end_timestamp.description: Timestamp in the video to stop processing at

MediaInfoTimeStamp.title: MediaInfoTimeStamp
MediaInfoTimeStamp.description: Media information using offset for live-streams.

id.title: Id
id.description: The model identifier, which can be referenced in the API endpoints.

created.title: Created
created.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) when the model was created.

owned_by.title: Owned By
owned_by.description: The organization that owns the model.

ModelInfo.title: ModelInfo
ModelInfo.description: Describes an OpenAI model offering that can be used with the API.

target_response_time.title: Target Response Time
target_response_time.description: The target response time of LVS in seconds.

usecase_event_duration.title: Usecase Event Duration
usecase_event_duration.description: The duration of the target event user wants to detect; example: it will take a box-falling event 3 seconds to happen.

chunk_size.title: Chunk Size
chunk_size.description: The recommended chunk size in seconds and no chunking is 0

min_tokens.title: Min Tokens
min_tokens.description: Minimum number of tokens to generate before the model is allowed to stop. Used with ignore_eos for fixed-length generation.

ignore_eos.title: Ignore Eos
ignore_eos.description: If true, ignore end-of-sequence token and continue generating until max_tokens. Useful for benchmarking with fixed output length.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique ID or list of IDs of the file(s)/live-stream(s) to summarize

url.title: Url
url.description: URL of the video to summarize

system_prompt.title: System Prompt
system_prompt.description: System prompt for the VLM. To enable reasoning with Cosmos Reason1, add <think></think> and <answer></answer> tags to the system prompt.
examples: You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user's question.

prompt.title: Prompt
examples: Write a concise and clear dense caption for the provided warehouse video

model.title: Model
model.description: Model to use for this query.

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in any given call.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: The sampling temperature to use for text generation. The higher the temperature value is, the less deterministic the output text will be.

top_p.title: Top P
top_p.description: The top-p sampling mass used for text generation. The top-p value determines the probability mass that is sampled at sampling time.

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: The number of highest probability vocabulary tokens to keep for top-k-filtering

chunk_duration.title: Chunk Duration
chunk_duration.description: Chunk videos into `chunkDuration` seconds. Set `0` for no chunking

chunk_overlap_duration.title: Chunk Overlap Duration
chunk_overlap_duration.description: Chunk Overlap Duration Time in Seconds. Set `0` for no overlap

summary_duration.title: Summary Duration
summary_duration.description: Summarize every `summaryDuration` seconds of the video. Applicable to live streams only.

media_info.title: Media Info
media_info.description: Provide Start and End times offsets for processing part of a video file. Not applicable for live-streaming.

num_frames_per_chunk.title: Num Frames Per Chunk
num_frames_per_chunk.description: DEPRECATED: Use num_frames_per_second_or_fixed_frames_chunk instead. Number of frames per chunk to use for the VLM.

enable_audio.title: Enable Audio
enable_audio.description: Enable transcription of the audio stream in the media

enable_reasoning.title: Enable Reasoning
enable_reasoning.description: Enable reasoning for VLM captions generation

num_frames_per_second_or_fixed_frames_ch.title: Num Frames Per Second Or Fixed Frames Chunk
num_frames_per_second_or_fixed_frames_ch.description: Number of frames per second (if use_fps_for_chunking=true) or fixed number of frames per chunk (if use_fps_for_chunking=false).

use_fps_for_chunking.title: Use Fps For Chunking
use_fps_for_chunking.description: If true, use num_frames_per_second_or_fixed_frames_chunk as FPS. If false, use it as a fixed frame count per chunk.

creation_time.title: Creation Time
creation_time.description: Creation time of the media in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2024-06-09T18:32:11.123Z). If provided, offsets frame timestamps in the response.

alert_category.title: Alert Category
alert_category.description: Alert category for VLM captions (e.g. 'Worker PPE Violation').

mm_processor_kwargs.title: Mm Processor Kwargs
mm_processor_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments for the multimodal processor (e.g., size, shortest_edge, longest_edge).

custom_metadata.title: Custom Metadata
custom_metadata.description: Custom metadata to be added to the summarization request. This is a JSON             object with key-value pairs. Custom metadata is supported only with user managed                 milvus db collections.

delete_external_collection.title: Delete External Collection
delete_external_collection.description: Delete the external collection at the end of the summarization request

schema.title: Schema
schema.description: JSON schema for structured output extraction from video content

scenario.title: Scenario
scenario.description: Scenario or use case context for the summarization

events.title: Events
events.description: List of events to detect or extract from the video

auto_generate_prompt.title: Auto Generate Prompt
auto_generate_prompt.description: Enable automatic prompt generation based on schema and events

override_vlm_prompt.title: Override Vlm Prompt
override_vlm_prompt.description: Override the VLM prompt with the user supplied prompt

objects_of_interest.title: Objects Of Interest
objects_of_interest.description: List of objects of interest to detect or extract from the video

model.title: Model
model.description: Model to use for caption generation.

prompt.title: Prompt
examples: Write a concise and clear dense caption for the provided video

chunk_duration.title: Chunk Duration
chunk_duration.description: Chunk videos into chunkDuration seconds. 0 for no chunking.

chunk_overlap_duration.title: Chunk Overlap Duration
chunk_overlap_duration.description: Chunk overlap duration in seconds. 0 for no overlap.

num_frames_per_second_or_fixed_frames_ch.title: Num Frames Per Second Or Fixed Frames Chunk
num_frames_per_second_or_fixed_frames_ch.description: Number of frames per second or fixed frames per chunk.

use_fps_for_chunking.title: Use Fps For Chunking
use_fps_for_chunking.description: Use FPS for chunking instead of fixed frame count.

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate per chunk.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature for VLM text generation.

top_p.title: Top P
top_p.description: Top-p sampling mass for VLM text generation.

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: Top-k filtering for VLM text generation.

enable_reasoning.title: Enable Reasoning
enable_reasoning.description: Enable reasoning for VLM captions generation.

enable_audio.title: Enable Audio
enable_audio.description: Enable audio ASR alongside video captioning.

creation_time.title: Creation Time
creation_time.description: ISO 8601 creation timestamp for the stream.

objects_of_interest.title: Objects Of Interest
objects_of_interest.description: Objects of interest for auto-prompt generation.

enable_vlm_structured_output.title: Enable Vlm Structured Output
enable_vlm_structured_output.description: Enable structured VLM output (controls auto-prompt format).

override_vlm_prompt.title: Override Vlm Prompt
override_vlm_prompt.description: If true, use prompt as-is instead of auto-generating from scenario/events.

id.title: Id
id.description: Stream ID that captioning was started for.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model identifier (must match the loaded model).

start_time.title: Start Time
start_time.description: Time window start for summarization (seconds, 0 = no filter).

end_time.title: End Time
end_time.description: Time window end for summarization (seconds, 0 = no filter).

enable_vlm_structured_output.title: Enable Vlm Structured Output
enable_vlm_structured_output.description: Enable structured VLM output for summarization.

collection_name.title: Collection Name
collection_name.description: External collection name for DB storage.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: List and describe the various models available in the API.

tags.name: Recommended Config
tags.description: Operations related to querying recommended LVS request parameters.

tags.name: Stream
tags.description: Operations for live-stream captioning and summarization.

tags.name: Summarization
tags.description: Operations related to video file summarization.
